description: Courier scanner gold dataset with explicit collection, labeling, and storage pipeline metadata.

collection.notes: Collect raw AWB slip images into this fixture folder or mounted object-storage sync folder.

labeling.process: ops-qc reviews label image, confirms AWB in courier portal/POD view, then sets expectedAwb + label.status=verified

storage.notes: Use local fixture for CI, mirror to object store for long-term retention.
